query:
-- MATH-1: Algebra & Functions (16 questions)
INSERT INTO bridge_academy_practice_questions (topicId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, explanation, difficulty, variationGroup) VALUES
(1, 'Solve for x: 2x + 5 = 13', 'multiple_choice', '["x = 4", "x = 6", "x = 8", "x = 9"]', 'x = 4', 'Subtract 5 from both sides: 2x = 8. Divide by 2: x = 4', 'easy', 'topic_1_group_0'),
(1, 'What is the slope of the line through (2, 3) and (4, 7)?', 'multiple_choice', '["1", "2", "3", "4"]', '2', 'Slope = (7-3)/(4-2) = 4/2 = 2', 'medium', 'topic_1_group_0'),
(1, 'If f(x) = 3x - 2, what is f(5)?', 'multiple_choice', '["13", "15", "17", "19"]', '13', 'f(5) = 3(5) - 2 = 15 - 2 = 13', 'easy', 'topic_1_group_1'),
(1, 'Solve: x² - 5x + 6 = 0', 'multiple_choice', '["x = 2, 3", "x = 1, 6", "x = 2, 4", "x = 3, 4"]', 'x = 2, 3', 'Factor: (x-2)(x-3) = 0, so x = 2 or x = 3', 'hard', 'topic_1_group_1'),
(1, 'What is the y-intercept of y = 2x + 5?', 'multiple_choice', '["2", "5", "-5", "2.5"]', '5', 'The y-intercept occurs when x = 0: y = 2(0) + 5 = 5', 'easy', 'topic_1_group_2'),
(1, 'Simplify: 3x + 2y - x + 4y', 'multiple_choice', '["2x + 6y", "4x + 6y", "2x + 2y", "3x + 4y"]', '2x + 6y', 'Combine like terms: (3x - x) + (2y + 4y) = 2x + 6y', 'easy', 'topic_1_group_2'),
(1, 'If 3x = 12, what is x?', 'multiple_choice', '["3", "4", "5", "6"]', '4', 'Divide both sides by 3: x = 12/3 = 4', 'easy', 'topic_1_group_3'),
(1, 'What is the solution to |x - 3| = 5?', 'multiple_choice', '["x = 8 or x = -2", "x = 5 or x = 1", "x = 8 only", "x = -2 only"]', 'x = 8 or x = -2', 'x - 3 = 5 gives x = 8; x - 3 = -5 gives x = -2', 'hard', 'topic_1_group_3'),
(1, 'Evaluate: 2³ × 3²', 'multiple_choice', '["36", "48", "72", "108"]', '72', '2³ = 8 and 3² = 9, so 8 × 9 = 72', 'medium', 'topic_1_group_4'),
(1, 'Which expression is equivalent to (x + 2)²?', 'multiple_choice', '["x² + 4", "x² + 4x + 4", "x² + 2x + 4", "x² + 4x + 2"]', 'x² + 4x + 4', '(x + 2)² = x² + 2(2x) + 4 = x² + 4x + 4', 'medium', 'topic_1_group_4'),
(1, 'Solve: 5x - 3 = 2x + 9', 'multiple_choice', '["x = 2", "x = 3", "x = 4", "x = 6"]', 'x = 4', '5x - 2x = 9 + 3, so 3x = 12, x = 4', 'easy', 'topic_1_group_5'),
(1, 'What is the domain of f(x) = 1/(x-2)?', 'multiple_choice', '["All real numbers", "All real numbers except 2", "All real numbers except 0", "x > 2"]', 'All real numbers except 2', 'The denominator cannot be zero, so x ≠ 2', 'hard', 'topic_1_group_5'),
(1, 'Expand: (x - 3)(x + 2)', 'multiple_choice', '["x² - x - 6", "x² + x - 6", "x² - 5x - 6", "x² - x + 6"]', 'x² - x - 6', 'FOIL: x² + 2x - 3x - 6 = x² - x - 6', 'medium', 'topic_1_group_6'),
(1, 'What is the inverse of f(x) = 2x + 3?', 'multiple_choice', '["f⁻¹(x) = (x - 3)/2", "f⁻¹(x) = (x + 3)/2", "f⁻¹(x) = 2x - 3", "f⁻¹(x) = x/2 - 3"]', 'f⁻¹(x) = (x - 3)/2', 'Swap x and y, then solve for y: x = 2y + 3, so y = (x - 3)/2', 'hard', 'topic_1_group_6'),
(1, 'Solve the system: x + y = 5, x - y = 1', 'multiple_choice', '["x = 3, y = 2", "x = 2, y = 3", "x = 4, y = 1", "x = 1, y = 4"]', 'x = 3, y = 2', 'Add equations: 2x = 6, so x = 3. Then y = 5 - 3 = 2', 'medium', 'topic_1_group_7'),
(1, 'What is the range of f(x) = x²?', 'multiple_choice', '["All real numbers", "All positive numbers", "y ≥ 0", "y > 0"]', 'y ≥ 0', 'Since x² is always non-negative, the range is y ≥ 0', 'hard', 'topic_1_group_7');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute -- MATH-1: Algebra & Functions (16 questions)
INSERT INTO bridge_academy_practice_questions (topicId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, explanation, difficulty, variationGroup) VALUES
(1, 'Solve for x: 2x + 5 = 13', 'multiple_choice', '["x = 4", "x = 6", "x = 8", "x = 9"]', 'x = 4', 'Subtract 5 from both sides: 2x = 8. Divide by 2: x = 4', 'easy', 'topic_1_group_0'),
(1, 'What is the slope of the line through (2, 3) and (4, 7)?', 'multiple_choice', '["1", "2", "3", "4"]', '2', 'Slope = (7-3)/(4-2) = 4/2 = 2', 'medium', 'topic_1_group_0'),
(1, 'If f(x) = 3x - 2, what is f(5)?', 'multiple_choice', '["13", "15", "17", "19"]', '13', 'f(5) = 3(5) - 2 = 15 - 2 = 13', 'easy', 'topic_1_group_1'),
(1, 'Solve: x² - 5x + 6 = 0', 'multiple_choice', '["x = 2, 3", "x = 1, 6", "x = 2, 4", "x = 3, 4"]', 'x = 2, 3', 'Factor: (x-2)(x-3) = 0, so x = 2 or x = 3', 'hard', 'topic_1_group_1'),
(1, 'What is the y-intercept of y = 2x + 5?', 'multiple_choice', '["2", "5", "-5", "2.5"]', '5', 'The y-intercept occurs when x = 0: y = 2(0) + 5 = 5', 'easy', 'topic_1_group_2'),
(1, 'Simplify: 3x + 2y - x + 4y', 'multiple_choice', '["2x + 6y", "4x + 6y", "2x + 2y", "3x + 4y"]', '2x + 6y', 'Combine like terms: (3x - x) + (2y + 4y) = 2x + 6y', 'easy', 'topic_1_group_2'),
(1, 'If 3x = 12, what is x?', 'multiple_choice', '["3", "4", "5", "6"]', '4', 'Divide both sides by 3: x = 12/3 = 4', 'easy', 'topic_1_group_3'),
(1, 'What is the solution to |x - 3| = 5?', 'multiple_choice', '["x = 8 or x = -2", "x = 5 or x = 1", "x = 8 only", "x = -2 only"]', 'x = 8 or x = -2', 'x - 3 = 5 gives x = 8; x - 3 = -5 gives x = -2', 'hard', 'topic_1_group_3'),
(1, 'Evaluate: 2³ × 3²', 'multiple_choice', '["36", "48", "72", "108"]', '72', '2³ = 8 and 3² = 9, so 8 × 9 = 72', 'medium', 'topic_1_group_4'),
(1, 'Which expression is equivalent to (x + 2)²?', 'multiple_choice', '["x² + 4", "x² + 4x + 4", "x² + 2x + 4", "x² + 4x + 2"]', 'x² + 4x + 4', '(x + 2)² = x² + 2(2x) + 4 = x² + 4x + 4', 'medium', 'topic_1_group_4'),
(1, 'Solve: 5x - 3 = 2x + 9', 'multiple_choice', '["x = 2", "x = 3", "x = 4", "x = 6"]', 'x = 4', '5x - 2x = 9 + 3, so 3x = 12, x = 4', 'easy', 'topic_1_group_5'),
(1, 'What is the domain of f(x) = 1/(x-2)?', 'multiple_choice', '["All real numbers", "All real numbers except 2", "All real numbers except 0", "x > 2"]', 'All real numbers except 2', 'The denominator cannot be zero, so x ≠ 2', 'hard', 'topic_1_group_5'),
(1, 'Expand: (x - 3)(x + 2)', 'multiple_choice', '["x² - x - 6", "x² + x - 6", "x² - 5x - 6", "x² - x + 6"]', 'x² - x - 6', 'FOIL: x² + 2x - 3x - 6 = x² - x - 6', 'medium', 'topic_1_group_6'),
(1, 'What is the inverse of f(x) = 2x + 3?', 'multiple_choice', '["f⁻¹(x) = (x - 3)/2", "f⁻¹(x) = (x + 3)/2", "f⁻¹(x) = 2x - 3", "f⁻¹(x) = x/2 - 3"]', 'f⁻¹(x) = (x - 3)/2', 'Swap x and y, then solve for y: x = 2y + 3, so y = (x - 3)/2', 'hard', 'topic_1_group_6'),
(1, 'Solve the system: x + y = 5, x - y = 1', 'multiple_choice', '["x = 3, y = 2", "x = 2, y = 3", "x = 4, y = 1", "x = 1, y = 4"]', 'x = 3, y = 2', 'Add equations: 2x = 6, so x = 3. Then y = 5 - 3 = 2', 'medium', 'topic_1_group_7'),
(1, 'What is the range of f(x) = x²?', 'multiple_choice', '["All real numbers", "All positive numbers", "y ≥ 0", "y > 0"]', 'y ≥ 0', 'Since x² is always non-negative, the range is y ≥ 0', 'hard', 'topic_1_group_7');
